pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh checking for this exact filename in the documents path.
Verified from environment script scripts/setup_oracle_analytics.ps1 which copies the dataset to this path during VM boot.
Verified from verifier.py and export_result.sh which explicitly test for "bar" or "nativeBar" and "narrative", "languageNarrative", or "nlg" visualization metadata.

Code execution via pandas read_excel revealed that the "sample_order_lines2023.xlsx" file only contains a "Sales" column. The "Region" column is completely absent from all columns in the dataset. Agents cannot fulfill this task requirement as described.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create visualizations using "Region" and "Sales" columns from "sample_order_lines2023.xlsx". However, direct programmatic inspection of the dataset reveals that the "Region" column does not exist. A "Sales" column is present, but an agent will be unable to use "Region" as instructed without modifying the data or relying on implicit Oracle auto-enrichment. All other claims regarding output paths, visualization types ("bar", "narrative"), and filenames have been accurately verified.
